title: Brands & Social Corner polish
features: Projects is now Brands — everywhere in the app, from the CRM hub to tasks and the dashboard
Turning a post into a task now asks who to assign it to, right from the calendar
Tasks created from posts show a calendar icon — click it to jump straight to the post on the content calendar
improvements: Cleaner post cards in the day panel — the side color tab is gone
Post status (Draft, Pending review, Reviewed, Approved) is now a colored dropdown
Time fields match the date fields — a clock icon with readable times, consistent on iPhone too

title: CRM hub & task fixes
features: New CRM section — Clients, Projects, Payments and Invoices now live under one roof, and the sidebar is much cleaner
Mobile bottom bar reworked: Dashboard, CRM, Tasks and Playground one tap away
improvements: The task panel is now a centered popup instead of a full-height side drawer
Creating a task opens the task panel immediately so you can fill in the details in one flow
Date fields now show a calendar icon and readable placeholder on iPhone
The CRM and Playground hubs animate in with subtle motion
fixes: The Add task button no longer hides behind the bottom bar on mobile — popups now always appear above it

title: Social Corner
features: Social Corner is live in the Playground — a content calendar for your social media team
Create color-coded brand calendars, optionally linked to your CRM clients
Plan posts with pillar, format, visual notes, caption, inspo link and a review status (draft → pending review → reviewed → approved)
Batch mode — Save & next keeps the card open so you can plan a whole week without leaving it
Click any calendar day to see everything scheduled that day, grouped per brand
Turn any planned post into a task on the Tasks page with one click

title: Task comments & Playground
features: Comment on any task and @mention teammates to tag and notify them
Board view now has a Completed column — drag a card into it to mark the task done
New Playground hub with Social Corner — plan content calendars per brand, schedule posts, and turn them into tasks
improvements: Internal Chats moved from /playground to its own /chats page (old links and notifications still work)

title: Smarter notifications
features: Toast notifications now stack smartly — extra alerts tuck neatly behind the newest one and fan out into a full list when you hover
Toasts can now show a secondary description line and appear in any screen corner
The sidebar notification bell can filter by category — Messages, Clients, or Tasks — with an icon on every alert

title: No-reply notification emails
improvements: Alert and notification emails (welcome, invites, role changes, task digest, chat alerts) now reply to no-reply@theruff.agency instead of an inbox nobody monitors

title: Revert scribble strike-through
improvements: Reverted the hand-drawn scribble strike-through effect on completed tasks — back to the classic line-through

title: Campaigns & File Workflow
features: Campaigns — create named task groups inside any client workspace
Campaign tasks support amounts, deadlines, paid status, and drag-to-reorder
Bulk paste — paste multiple lines into any task input to create tasks instantly
Upload a new file version directly from the preview modal with an optional note
File status badges (Amend, Declined, Approved) visible on task file rows
Overview file counters are clickable — jump straight to the files page
Notification bell now shows file alerts (amended, declined, pending) across all clients
Client contact info (email, phone, website) shown in the workspace sidebar

title: Polish & Bug Fixes
improvements: Client and task group cards now auto-switch to white text on dark custom colors
Pastel card colors keep their original warm color-matched text
What's New popup now loads content reliably for all users
Invoice PDF export cleaned up — no overlapping inputs or browser UI artifacts
Status dropdown no longer clips inside table containers
Mobile button and pill styles unified across all pages
fixes: Invoice stat cards redesigned to match app design language
Settings nav tabs and filter pills use consistent rounded style
Payment method templates now show per-method default fields

title: Invoices & Settings Overhaul
features: Full invoicing system — create, send, and track invoices
Invoice builder with 4 layouts and inline editing
Three creation paths: from tasks, from client, or blank
Shareable invoice links — clients can view without an account
PDF export via browser print dialog
Settings expanded to 8 tabs: Profile, Branding, Business Info, Payments, General, Emails, Integrations, Billing
Avatar and cover image upload in Profile settings
Payment template builder in Payments settings
Getting Started checklist widget with auto-completion detection
improvements: Invoices nav item added to sidebar (desktop and mobile)
Business info in settings feeds directly into invoice FROM section

title: Sharing & Task Dashboard
features: Client workspace sharing with one-click shareable links
Public shared workspace for recipients (no account needed)
Per-member view/edit permission controls
Members panel in client workspace right sidebar
Task-only dashboard with completion rings and group cards
Tick off tasks directly from the task dashboard
improvements: All modals and popups now always center on screen (fixed stacking context bug)
Sidebar logo navigates to dashboard instead of full page reload
fixes: Share link RLS bypass — cached client info in shared_clients table

title: Bug Fix
fixes: Syntax error fix in SettingsContext restoreFromTrash function

title: Tasks & App Modes
features: Tasks page with standalone task list and task groups
Task group workspace with full task management
App mode switch (Clients Only, Tasks Only, Dual)
Clients section label rename in settings
Task mode toggle on client pages
Changelog popup

title: Drag & Drop
features: Task drag and drop with sort order persistence
Task filter dropdown (All, Overdue, Due Today, Due Tomorrow)
Sentence case auto-formatting on task save
Pastel color randomisation for new clients

title: Bug Fixes
fixes: Drag and drop click conflict on client cards

title: Currency Improvements
improvements: Currency input decimal support and comma formatting

title: Deadlines & Currency
features: Deadline tracking on tasks with calendar picker
Overdue button with red badge in dashboard
Dashboard tab restructure with filter tabs
Currency conversion system (NGN / USD)

title: Fonts & Branding
features: Font system with Google Fonts and custom font upload
Client logos support
Drag and drop client card reordering
Overdue indicators on client cards and workspace
Notification bell with upcoming deadlines

title: Settings & Theming
features: Settings page with full appearance controls
Trash with 45-day retention and one-click restore
Accent color theming applied globally

title: Supabase Migration
features: Migrated from localStorage to Supabase
Data persists across devices and sessions

title: Initial Release
features: Initial build with React, Vite, Tailwind CSS
Dashboard overview with earnings tracking
Clients management with task tracking
Payments history page
Data stored in localStorage
